default.precautions: Wear protective gear; spray in calm wind; avoid drift to water bodies; observe pre-harvest interval on label.
default.if_fails: Re-verify diagnosis with a fresh sample; rotate chemistry; check spray coverage and water pH; consult an agronomist if symptoms spread after two cycles.

Healthy.precautions: No chemical application needed. Scout weekly and maintain nutrition and irrigation.
Healthy.if_fails: N/A — if leaves worsen, run detection again or submit multiple angles.

Powdery_Mildew.pesticide_name: Sulfur 80% WP (or compatible systemic per label)
Powdery_Mildew.precautions: Do not mix with oils; test on a small area in heat; bee-safe timing.
Powdery_Mildew.if_fails: Improve airflow; alternate FRAC groups; ensure upper and lower leaf coverage; re-run model on new lesions.

Rust.precautions: Rotate modes of action; avoid spray under drought stress without advisory.
Rust.if_fails: Remove heavily infected leaves if permitted; check for alternate host plants nearby; escalate to extension lab testing.

Anthracnose.precautions: Protect eyes/skin; do not enter treated area until dry.
Anthracnose.if_fails: Sanitize tools; avoid overhead irrigation; verify strain with lab if lesions persist.

Bacterial_Blight.precautions: Bactericides are protective; copper may phytotox young foliage at high temps.
Bacterial_Blight.if_fails: Switch to resistant cultivars where available; reduce leaf wetness hours; bacterial issues need early rounds—consider antibiotic where legally allowed.

Leaf_Spot.precautions: Respect resistance management; limit sprays per season per label.
Leaf_Spot.if_fails: Increase scouting frequency; remove crop debris; validate disease ID—some spots are nutrient, not fungal.

Mosaic_Virus.pesticide_name: No curative pesticide (vector and hygiene management)
Mosaic_Virus.precautions: Control aphids/whiteflies; disinfect tools; uproot highly symptomatic plants to slow spread.
Mosaic_Virus.if_fails: Confirm virus with testing; manage vectors with IPM; replace seed stock next season.

Diseased.precautions: Always read label for crop and stage; calibrate sprayer.
Diseased.if_fails: Capture clearer images for the model; combine with field scouting; seek local extension advice.
